mentions.note: Actually interesting per Cramer (was planning piece on why BB may be interesting), but home-team Corning gets the nod.
Technology play that Cramer was planning to feature. Acknowledges it may be very interesting here, but defers to Corning as hometown team preference.
Cramer acknowledges it's good and they were planning a piece on it, but local pride goes to Corning (from Corning, NY caller). Both are plays on tech trends, but Corning is preferred here.
Dwayne pitches Blackberry. Cramer acknowledges piece in progress on why BB may be interesting, but hometown loyalty to Corning wins out. Technology credentials exist but not top-of-mind call today.
Tech/cybersecurity story Cramer finds interesting but makes local bias joke favoring Corning. Acknowledges company has merit but charts extremely beaten down.

Caller David claims Nvidia partnership and OS used in self-driving cars signal comeback. Stock bounced $2→$5. Cramer calls it 'vampire' stock, defers deep analysis, says analyst Ben Stodo will investigate.
Really interesting technology emerging in automotive world; stock running hot last three months; Cramer thinks goes higher.
